documentation_sources: Context7 /rapptz/discord.py: persistent views require timeout=None, stable custom_id values, and startup add_view registration
notes: This snapshot complements the custom_id snapshot by proving each persistent view class is registered with bot.add_view during cog startup.
FormPanelView is registered for saved form rows during Forms.cog_load; new panels also register the active view when posted.
JukeboxControls is registered during LokiMusic construction because the view needs the cog instance for callbacks.
TicketPanelView and TicketChannelView are registered during Tickets.cog_load after ticket schema initialization.
